summary: Verified all 3 reported bugs in Pro Catalog are FIXED. Backend APIs: 11/11 tests passed. All CRUD operations work correctly: Delete content (BUG #1), Delete offer (BUG #2), Toggle publish/unpublish (BUG #3). Frontend code reviewed and correctly calls the proper endpoints.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' and 'textShadow*' style props - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: BUG #1 FIX VERIFIED: DELETE /api/pro/content-library/{id} returns 200 with {success: true}
BUG #2 FIX VERIFIED: DELETE /api/pro/offers/{id} returns 200 with {success: true}
BUG #3 FIX VERIFIED: PUT /api/pro/offers/{id}/publish toggles is_published and returns 200 with {success: true, is_published: bool}
Frontend api.ts FIX VERIFIED: Both publishOffer() and unpublishOffer() now call same toggle endpoint PUT /pro/offers/{id}/publish (lines 461-462)
Frontend catalog.tsx VERIFIED: handleTogglePublish() calls proAPI.publishOffer() which triggers the toggle endpoint (line 465)
Backend server.py VERIFIED: toggle_offer_publish() flips is_published boolean correctly (lines 10235-10251)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Catalog page loads correctly, delete and publish buttons visible

seed_data_creation: Test content and offers created/deleted via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs are FIXED and VERIFIED: 1) Content deletion works - DELETE /api/pro/content-library/{id} 2) Offer deletion works - DELETE /api/pro/offers/{id} 3) Publish toggle works - PUT /api/pro/offers/{id}/publish is a toggle endpoint that flips is_published. The key fix was in api.ts where unpublishOffer() was calling a non-existent /unpublish endpoint - now both publish and unpublish call the same /publish toggle endpoint.

features_tested.details: Toggle endpoint works multiple times: OFF->ON->OFF->ON
Page loads with content list, delete buttons, and publish badges visible
Offers tab shows offers with 'Publié' badge and delete button

rca_of_the_issue: Root cause was in /app/frontend/utils/api.ts - unpublishOffer() was calling PUT /pro/offers/{id}/unpublish which doesn't exist (returns 404). Backend only has one toggle endpoint at PUT /pro/offers/{id}/publish. FIX: Both publishOffer() and unpublishOffer() now call the same /publish endpoint which toggles the is_published boolean. Additional fix in catalog.tsx: handleTogglePublish() now only calls publishOffer() instead of conditionally calling publish/unpublish based on current state.
